synapse7.name: SYNAPSE-7 — AI kNN + AutoTune + 6-Scale + RSI + CVD
synapse7.description: Kombinira 5 podsustava. Min 4/5 signala za ulaz. kMem 100 (25h). SL 2% / TP 4%.

synapse_t.name: ULTRA — 18-Signal Combined Strategy
synapse_t.description: Kombinira 18 signala: EMA, Cross, E50, RSI zona, E55, ADX>18, Chop, 6Sc, CVD, RSI recovery, MACD hist, E145, Vol, MACD cross, RSI smjer, ADX>25, SRS (S/R bounce), SRB (S/R breakout). Min 10/18 signala. H/L breakout entry. SL 1% / TP 2% (RR 1:2). 100x leverage → SL = likvidacija.

mega.name: MEGA — EMA9/21 + EMA55/200 + RSI + ADX + Choppiness

risk_rules: 4 neovisna portfolia × $1000 startni kapital — jedan simbol može biti otvoren u sva 4 istovremeno
Risk-based sizing: margin = equity × 1% | notional = margin × 100x | SL 1% × 100x = 100% margine = gubiš samo ulog
ULTRA: SL 1.5% / TP 2.5% / 50x leverage / rizik 1% banke po tradeu | TP hit = +1.25% banke
Samo jedna pozicija po simbolu PO PORTFOLIJU istovremeno
Max 5 otvorenih pozicija po portfoliju istovremeno
SYNAPSE-7: kMem 100 (25h AI memory), minSig 4/5 | ULTRA: 18 signala (16 + SRS + SRB), minSig 10/18, SL 1% / TP 2%, 100x leverage, rizik 1% banke
Uklonjeni simboli (loš WR): ORDIUSDT, WLDUSDT, TRUMPUSDT, AVAXUSDT, AAVEUSDT
